summary: Crypto markets show subdued weekend action with Bitcoin holding steady around $78k-$80k after recent highs near $80k, while analysts eye breakouts to $82k-$84k amid low volatility. Commodities like gold and Brent oil remain range-bound with neutral-to-bullish tilts influenced by Middle East tensions. Equities and forex exhibit cautious optimism, with S&P 500 targeting higher amid tech strength, but no major new altcoin narratives emerging today.
